channel.title: Tampa Bay News Monitor
channel.description: Press releases and breaking news, Tampa Bay

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] News Tonight - Top Headlines and Weather for July 23
item.description: Why health insurance denials get reversed after media attention, anti-gun violence efforts grow after St. Pete mother killed, heat persists

item.title: [WATCHLIST: indictment] [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Special prosecutor drops all felony criminal charges against Louisiana Attorney General Murrill
item.description: Felony charges against Louisiana Attorney General Liz Murrill have been dismissed — just weeks after her indictment. Here's what led to the case being thrown out.

item.title: [BREAKING] [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Homicide rates in the US are nearing a historic low
item.description: The homicide rate was 18% lower in the first half of 2026 compared to the first half of 2025 across 30 major U.S. cities, according to a report out Thursday from the Council on Criminal Justice.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Cyclosporiasis cases rise to over 150 in Florida, doctors discuss what they are seeing
item.description: According to the disease tracker on the Florida Department of Health's website, there have been 158 confirmed or probable cases statewide between May 1 and July 18.

item.title: [ABC7 Suncoast (WWSB)] Anna Marina Island sea turtle nests washed away amid Bertha waves
[ABC7 Suncoast (WWSB)] Sarasota bakery rounds out Sarasota trifecta in the coveted Michelin list
[ABC7 Suncoast (WWSB)] Goodwill opens third Bargain Barn in Venice area
[WATCHLIST: county commission] [ABC7 Suncoast (WWSB)] Manatee County Commission candidates face voters at Tiger Bay forum
[ABC7 Suncoast (WWSB)] Sarasota County issues rabies advisory after discovering infected raccoon
[Hillsborough County Sheriff] Deputy Muon Released from Hospital Jul 18, 2026
[Hillsborough County Sheriff] Death Investigation Underway in Plant City Jul 23, 2026

[ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Trump imposes double-digit tariffs on dozens of countries as his 10% levies are set to expire Friday
item.description: President Donald Trump is going ahead with new double-digit tariffs on dozens of U.S. trading partners.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Organization works to curb gun violence after mother of four shot and killed in St. Pete
item.description: Leaders with the NAACP said even one shooting is too many, and they are doing everything they can to curb gun violence.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Health insurance denials reversed after media scrutiny, raising questions about how the system really works
item.description: Our investigative reporting has uncovered Fla. patients denied coverage for cancer treatments, surgeries and medications — only to see those denials reversed once journalists started asking questions.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Will SpaceX buy Tesla? Elon Musk is not revealing his plans
item.description: Elon Musk is now a trillionaire — and Wall Street is buzzing about a possible Tesla-SpaceX merger worth $3 trillion. What do you think: smart move or too much power in one place? 👇

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] USF blitzes AAC Media Day
item.description: USF kicks off fall camp Aug. 5 as players rally around first-year head coach Brian Hartline's hands-on coaching style and vision for the program.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] 2 people found deceased in Hunters Green community in New Tampa; death investigation underway: TPD
item.description: Tampa Police Department said it is conducting a death investigation in the Hunters Green Community in New Tampa.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Former Gulf High students return to New Port Richey campus for one last goodbye before demolition
item.description: A piece of New Port Richey history is about to disappear, but not before generations of former students get one last chance to relive the memories they made there.

item.title: [FOX 13 Tampa Bay] Tampa police find two dead while searching for person of interest
item.description: Tampa police officers searching for a person of interest in an unrelated case found a man and a woman dead Thursday afternoon inside a home on Hunters Pond Drive.

item.title: [FOX 13 Tampa Bay] Tampa police and UTampa launch new partnership that fast tracks college seniors into law enforcement careers
item.description: The Tampa Police Department and The University of Tampa are launching a first-of-its-kind formal partnership to fast-track college seniors directly into law enforcement careers.

item.title: [FOX 13 Tampa Bay] Seminole tenant faces five-day delay after ceiling collapse at Buena Vista Apartments
item.description: A Seminole tenant is demanding accountability after waiting five days for apartment repairs following a structural collapse during a weekend storm along Park Road.

item.title: [ABC7 Suncoast (WWSB)] Bissinger’s brings truffles—and a giveback—to Sarasota
[Sarasota Herald-Tribune] DeSantis legacy, Alligator Alcatraz & World Cup lessons: Podcast

[ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Average 30-year US mortgage rate climbs to 6.58%, highest level in nearly a year
item.description: The average 30-year mortgage rate just hit its highest point in nearly 12 months. Here's what that means for homebuyers and those looking to refinance.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] FDOT announces nightly lane closures across Tampa Bay through Aug. 1
item.description: Tampa Bay drivers should prepare for overnight delays this week as FDOT crews begin multiple construction and maintenance projects across Hillsborough, Pinellas, Pasco and Citrus Counties.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] FDA identifies second cyclospora outbreak as US case count reaches record high
item.description: Federal health officials are investigating a new outbreak of cyclosporiasis, with the number of cases of the parasitic intestinal illness already at a record high in the U.S. and growing.

item.title: [FOX 13 Tampa Bay] Venice Goodwill Bargain Barn: New pay-by-the-pound store opens on Triple Diamond Boulevard
item.description: Hundreds of shoppers lined up outside Venice's newest Goodwill Bargain Barn on Thursday morning, eager to score deeply discounted items sold by the pound.

item.title: [BREAKING] [ABC7 Suncoast (WWSB)] BREAKING: Vehicle fire shuts down I-75 northbound near Fruitville Road during PM rush
[ABC7 Suncoast (WWSB)] Florida shoppers can save on school supplies, clothes and computers during month-long tax holiday
[ABC7 Suncoast (WWSB)] Pinellas deputy handles first alligator call with help from bystanders
[Sarasota Herald-Tribune] Explosive diarrhea parasite concerns rise at Sarasota hospital
[Sarasota Herald-Tribune] James Fishback drops big personal announcement
[City of Tampa] Tampa Police Conduct Death Investigation
